messages.content: Plan 7 days in Maldives with budget $100.

Budget of $100 for 7 days ($14/day) is insufficient for any realistic travel. Minimum recommended: $105 for ultra-budget camping. Consider: (1) Increasing budget to $140+ ( tier), (2) Reducing duration to 5 days, or (3) Local staycation options.

supervisor_instruction: Budget of $100 for 7 days ($14/day) is insufficient for any realistic travel. Minimum recommended: $105 for ultra-budget camping. Consider: (1) Increasing budget to $140+ ( tier), (2) Reducing duration to 5 days, or (3) Local staycation options.
user_query: Plan 7 days in Maldives with budget $100.
